## Wrapper Fixture Coverage

The Go generator uses checked-in ABI JSON fixtures compiled once from imported
wrapper test contracts.

| Source spec | Go coverage | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Cli.spec.ts` | Not ported | The Go CLI is intentionally thin and already exercised by generator package tests. |
| `ErrorsAtCodegen.spec.ts` | `TestGenerateWrapperFixtureABIs` over `err-*.abi.json` | Not 1:1: the source checks expect codegen errors for continuations and non-standard map keys. `tugen` currently either falls back/TODOs or supports flat struct dict keys through tonutils-go. |
| `HasNotInitializedStorage.spec.ts` | `TestFixtureABIStorageAtDeployment` | ABI assertion ported. `fromStorage`, `toShard`, workchain/address derivation are not generated by `tugen` yet. |
| `LotsOfAnnotations.spec.ts` | `TestFixtureABIAnnotations` | ABI annotation assertions ported. |
| `LotsOfStorage.spec.ts` | `TestFixtureABIDefaultValues` | ABI default-value assertions ported. `fromStorage` default insertion is not generated by `tugen` yet. |
| `LotsOfThrows.spec.ts` | `TestFixtureABIThrows` | ABI thrown-error assertions ported. Generated `Errors` constants are not supported by `tugen` yet. |
| `DebugPrintDemos.spec.ts` | ABI fixture smoke in `TestGenerateWrapperFixtureABIs` | Runtime debug-print tests require a dynamic stack printer and sandbox execution surface that `tugen` does not have. Current generated wrapper has known compile gaps. |
| `GenericUnionLabels.spec.ts` | ABI fixture smoke in `TestGenerateWrapperFixtureABIs` | Runtime generic-union serialization/getter tests require dynamic codecs and sandbox execution. Current generated wrapper has known compile gaps for generic union labels. |
| `LotsOfGetters.spec.ts` | ABI fixture smoke in `TestGenerateWrapperFixtureABIs` | Runtime get-method tests require sandbox execution and dynamic get-method caller. Current generated wrapper has known compile gaps. |
| `LotsOfMessages.spec.ts` | ABI fixture smoke in `TestGenerateWrapperFixtureABIs` | Send helpers and `createCellOf*` helpers are not generated by `tugen` yet. |
| `LotsOfWrappers.spec.ts` | ABI fixture smoke in `TestGenerateWrapperFixtureABIs` plus focused Go unit tests in `main_test.go` | Full roundtrip coverage needs generated pack/unpack methods, custom pack/unpack registry, and dynamic serialization. Current generated wrapper has known compile gaps. |
| `TolkCounter.spec.ts` | ABI fixture smoke in `TestGenerateWrapperFixtureABIs` | Sandbox deploy/send integration is not generated by `tugen` yet. |

`small.tolk` is not included as an ABI fixture: the current Acton compiler rejects
its old `assert(1)` syntax before ABI emission.
